hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/application" && npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/application" && out=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); code=$?; [ $code -ne 0 ] && printf '\nType errors:\n' && echo "$out" | head -30;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.md) exit 0;; esac; matches=$(grep -nE '/Users/[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+/|/home/[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+/' "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -3); [ -n "$matches" ] && printf '
⚠ Absolute path detected in %s:
%s
Dung duong dan tuong doi hoac $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) thay the.
' "$f" "$matches"; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */.env|*/.env.*|*.pem|*.key|*.p12|*.pfx|*.secret|*/secrets.*) echo "BLOCKED: file nhay cam bi cam doc: $f" >&2; exit 2;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
